creator: jwagner@graffadmin.com
text:
When I got in this morning, several people using my mail server told me 
that nobody has received e-mail for most of the holiday weekend.  I went 
on the server and it was queued up but not being delivered - lots of 
connection reset by peer and lost connection with 127.0.0.1 errors.  I 
restarted postfix to no avail.  I then restarted amavisd and they 
started being delivered.  It seems to be working correctly right now, 
even though there are 7 messages that won't leave the queue.  I do not 
know how long it will continue working.  It seems too coincidental to be 
a coincidence that this happened for the first time immediately after 
having the problem described above for the first time.  Please bump the 
priority of this case to high if possible.

Also, there are many of the following errors shown in /var/log/maillog:

Sep 8 00:04:24 graffsales amavis[91808]: (!!)TROUBLE in child_init_hook: 
BDB no dbS: Lock table is out of available locker entries, . at (eval 
97) line 27.
Sep 8 00:04:24 graffsales amavis[91808]: (!!)TROUBLE in child_init_hook: 
BDB no dbS: Lock table is out of available locker entries, . at (eval 
97) line 27.
Sep 8 00:04:24 graffsales amavis[91808]: (!)DIE: Suicide in 
child_init_hook: BDB no dbS: Lock table is out of available locker 
entries, . at (eval 97) line 27.

This is the first time I've seen such errors.

Jim
